command: test -e docs/runbooks/formatter-suggestions.md; echo formatter_runbook:$?; test -e docs/smoke/m066-formatter-suggestions.md; echo smoke_template:$?; rg -n "formatterSuggestions|format suggestions|mention-format-suggestions|Format-only formatter suggestion request completed|Combined review-and-format mention request completed|publisherFailed|maxSuggestions|reviewOutputKey" src scripts docs package.json README.md .env.example bunfig.toml 2>/dev/null
